solution.heading: WHY CHOOSE US?
solution.warning1-text: Light vehicle detected in autonomous truck route — North Sector
solution.warning2-text: Unauthorized entry detected in active autonomous traffic corridor
solution.warning3-text: Notification sent to driver and control center in 43ms
solution.lead: In modern open-pit mining, high-tonnage autonomous vehicles operate at speeds and loads that make emergency stops physically impossible. Every second of delay is a potential fatality.
solution.check1: Non-intrusive integration with existing Fleet Management Systems (FMS)
solution.check2: 43ms alert latency via private LTE/5G or Mesh Network fallback
solution.check4: ISO 21448 and MSHA safety standard compliance out of the box
solution.check5: Operational in deep pit zones with zero cloud dependency
solution.mission-text: Deliver IoT-based technological solutions that prevent accidents in mining environments through real-time monitoring and early warning systems — protecting lives and optimizing operational safety.
solution.vision-title: The global standard for mining safety
solution.vision-text: Become the leading smart security solution for autonomous mining operations globally, driving the digital transformation of the sector towards safer, more efficient and reliable environments.

profiles.heading: THREE STAKEHOLDERS, ONE SYSTEM
profiles.subtitle: MineGuard is purpose-built to address the specific needs of every critical role in open-pit mining operations — from the boardroom to the cab.
profiles.p1-b1: Elimination of downtime costs from collision incidents
profiles.p1-b2: Measurable reduction in operational insurance premiums
profiles.p1-b3: ISO 21448 & MSHA compliance built in from day one
profiles.p1-b4: Board-ready safety analytics and incident reports
profiles.p1-b5: Positive ROI from the first month of deployment
profiles.p2-b1: Unified live dashboard: every vehicle in a single view
profiles.p2-b2: Intelligent alert classification by criticality level
profiles.p2-b4: Predictive risk analytics segmented by sector and shift
profiles.p2-b5: Full GPS-correlated event log with exportable evidence
profiles.p3-b1: Your personal lifesaving co-pilot on every shift
profiles.p3-b2: Non-intrusive visual and audio proximity alerts
profiles.p3-b3: Biometric fatigue detection with automatic reporting
profiles.p3-b4: One-touch panic button with immediate dispatch response
profiles.p3-b5: Zero learning curve — operational from minute one

edge.p1-body: MineGuard's Edge Node processes all proximity data locally on the vehicle, eliminating cloud round-trip latency entirely. Critical safety decisions are computed and dispatched in milliseconds — no internet required.
edge.p2-body: Industry-standard V2X enables direct vehicle-to-vehicle data exchange without centralized infrastructure. The mesh self-heals and maintains safety coverage even in deep pit zones with no connectivity.
edge.p3-body: Seven synchronized IoT nodes form a geofenced perimeter around each autonomous corridor. Any incursion triggers a multi-layered alert cascade to the driver, FMS, and control room within 43 milliseconds.

how-it-works.heading: HOW THE MESH WORKS
how-it-works.s1-body: IoT nodes mounted on vehicles and infrastructure continuously broadcast GNSS positions via V2X protocol. The mesh self-organizes to maintain coverage even in deep pit zones.
how-it-works.s2-body: The onboard Edge Node analyzes proximity data locally. Collision trajectories are computed using predictive algorithms — no cloud dependency for critical alerts.
how-it-works.s3-body: At 43ms, simultaneous alerts fire: to the light vehicle HMI device, the autonomous truck's FMS, and the control room supervisor dashboard — all before a human can blink.
how-it-works.s4-body: Geofenced corridors auto-update. The incident is logged with GPS coordinates, timestamps and vehicle IDs — feeding the analytics dashboard for continuous safety improvement.

faq.heading: COMMON QUESTIONS
faq.q1: How does MineGuard integrate with existing autonomous fleets?
faq.a1: MineGuard uses industry-standard V2X communication protocols to connect with Fleet Management Systems (FMS). It is installed non-intrusively as an additional safety layer — no modifications to existing vehicle firmware are required.
faq.q2: What is the precision level of the positioning system?
faq.a2: MineGuard utilizes high-precision GNSS with RTK corrections, providing centimeter-level accuracy (±2cm). This precision is critical for safe interaction between light vehicles and autonomous mining giants weighing over 300 tonnes.
faq.q3: Does it work in areas without conventional internet coverage?
faq.a3: Yes. MineGuard operates on private LTE/5G mining networks and has a local Mesh Network fallback mode. Critical proximity alerts are issued even with zero central server connectivity.
faq.q4: What is the standard implementation timeframe?
faq.a4: A standard deployment for a fleet of 20 light vehicles takes approximately 2 weeks, including digital environment calibration, IoT node positioning, FMS integration, and full personnel training.

terms.title: TERMS & CONDITIONS
terms.s1-text: By accessing and using MineGuard's services, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use our Digital Safety Mesh, mobile applications, IoT devices, or related platform services.
terms.s2-text: MineGuard provides IoT-based collision prevention services for open-pit mining operations, including real-time positioning, V2X anti-collision protocols, the Digital Safety Mesh, proximity alerts, and a 24/7 monitoring map. Our platform is designed to enhance safety in environments where autonomous high-tonnage vehicles share routes with light vehicles operated by personnel.
terms.s3-li1: You must provide accurate and complete information during registration of operators, vehicles, and fleet units.
terms.s3-li2: You are responsible for maintaining the security of account credentials and access tokens.
terms.s3-li3: You must ensure proper installation, calibration, and periodic maintenance of all MineGuard IoT devices.
terms.s3-li4: You agree not to tamper with sensors or interfere with the normal operation of the Digital Safety Mesh.
terms.s3-li5: You must comply with all applicable mining safety regulations and local laws while using our services.
terms.s4-text: Services are provided on a per-unit monthly subscription basis under the Full Safety Suite plan, as indicated in the Pricing section. Payments are processed monthly and are non-refundable unless otherwise required by law. We reserve the right to modify pricing with 30 days' advance notice to subscribers.
terms.s5-text: We collect and process telemetry, GNSS positioning, and operational data from connected vehicles for service provision and safety analytics. We are committed to protecting your privacy and will not share personal data with third parties without explicit consent, except as required by law. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest according to industry standards.
terms.s6-text: MineGuard provides monitoring and alerting services but is not responsible for collisions, mechanical failures, downtime, or any consequences resulting from misuse, network outages, or operator error. Our platform is intended to assist and augment, not replace, the safety protocols and professional judgment of mining operators and drivers.
terms.s7-text: IoT devices provided by MineGuard must be installed by qualified personnel following our integration manual. Improper installation, unauthorized modifications, or tampering may void your warranty and subscription. MineGuard is not liable for damages resulting from misuse of equipment or alterations performed outside our certified installation process.
terms.s8-text: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the service at any time with reasonable notice. We will make commercially reasonable efforts to ensure service continuity and minimize disruptions to critical safety operations.
terms.s9-text: Companies integrating MineGuard with existing Fleet Management Systems (FMS) must maintain appropriate operational licenses and certifications. MineGuard acts as an additional safety layer and does not guarantee the performance of third-party autonomous systems or vehicles beyond our scope.
terms.s10-text: Either party may terminate the service agreement with 30 days' written notice. MineGuard reserves the right to immediately terminate accounts that violate these terms. Upon termination, access to the platform and stored data will be revoked after a 30-day grace period.
terms.s11-text: All content, trademarks, logos, software, and intellectual property on the MineGuard platform are owned by Vertex. Users may not reproduce, distribute, reverse engineer, or create derivative works without express written permission.
terms.s12-text: For questions regarding these Terms and Conditions, please contact us at support@mineguard.io or visit our website for more information.
